top_signals.title: China's global e-commerce push stalls as Iran war lifts costs, dampens demand - Reuters
top_signals.summary: China's global e-commerce push stalls as Iran war lifts costs, dampens demand  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks That Threatened Talks
top_signals.summary: Iran and Israel agreed to ease strikes against each other after a flare-up in violence threatened to derail peace negotiations and led President Donald Trump to appeal for de-escalation. Bloomberg's Dan Williams and Jill Disis report. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Saylor blamed AI for bitcoin crash. Arca has one word for that: Nonsense
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Apple's Siri AI Has Upper Edge, IDC Says
top_signals.summary: IDC Senior Research Director Nabila Popal says Apple's Siri AI holds two key advantages over other AI models: its access to personal context and strong focus on privacy and security. She also says Apple has caught up on AI strategy this year and its new features will enhance user experience. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CIMB Says ‘Good Time’ to Invest in Battered Indonesia, Seeks M&A
top_signals.summary: CIMB Group Holdings Bhd., Malaysia’s second-biggest bank, says it’s seeking merger and acquisition opportunities in neighboring Indonesia despite a slump in investor confidence in Southeast Asia’s biggest economy.
